title: Left Right Goodnight
description: Adds a new type of weapon - knuckles. Also new armor - leather slides.
body:
![Title says "Left Right Goodnight"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa22b11294e4a36cdd9dd321987576c23246ba11.png)

![blank image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a0effbaaf88c7f0b9874660d5280227d5cad8d8_0.webp)
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bddf82df990caa25aec33dbcd208144ffb5f62b1.png)
**This mod adds a new weapon type - knuckles. Also new armor - leather slides.**

# Mod will be rewritten from scratch!

Knuckles are dual wielded weapons that cannot be used with a shield. They have more base damage than a sword, but much less durability. Equipping two knuckles at the same time will increase your movement speed.

Leather Slides are a new type of armour that increases movement speed and also allows you perform a dash in exchange for a small amount of durability. Just jump while sneaking and you will dash.

Mod based on idea from Chino's animated:
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/YlRUgWmW4S8

![blank image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a0effbaaf88c7f0b9874660d5280227d5cad8d8_0.webp)

![Mod compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/affe313b510f76e9dd08ec1cb52ad9473ba8514f_0.webp)
| Mod | Compatibility |Compatibility level|
|-----|---------------|-------------------|
|[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)|Fully compatible|All recipes are visible|
|[Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)|Partially compatible|Knuckles can be used, but they do not have animations from better combat _(Will be fixed in a separate version)_|
|[Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)|Partially compatible|Knuckles have animations, but have an extremely low attack speed and no ability _(Not recommended for use with left right goodnight)_|

![Blank image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a0effbaaf88c7f0b9874660d5280227d5cad8d8_0.webp)

# Special thanks to:
- @Com1c_owo for testing
- Chino's animated for inspiration and main idea of the mod


![blank image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a0effbaaf88c7f0b9874660d5280227d5cad8d8_0.webp)
